player_notes.jalen williams: OKC being conservative with Williams' minutes as he works back from a hamstring injury that sidelined him for two months. Depress all prop lines — points, assists, 3s — until minutes restriction is lifted.
player_notes.giannis antetokounmpo: Remained out vs. Portland (left knee injury). Still sidelined heading into Spurs vs. Bucks today; avoid Bucks role players who benefited last game as Spurs are likely to blow this out.

game_notes.SAS vs MIL: Giannis remains out with left knee injury, gutting Bucks' ceiling. Spurs on 8-game win streak; Bucks role players may see garbage-time minutes with lopsided score likely.
game_notes.CHI vs OKC: Jaden Ivey and Jalen Smith ruled out for the remainder of the Bulls' season, thinning Chicago's rotation further.
